items.text: He crossed to the window and looked out. The sky over Boston was not blue. A curtain of red fire hung from the zenith to the horizon. It rippled like heavy fabric in a draft. The color was wrong???not the amber of sunset, not the soft rose of dawn. This was arterial red. The red of something opened. The aurora borealis. But it wasn't in the north. It was directly overhead, and it was throbbing.
items.title: Ep2 - character_state
